brand.name: washoku
brand.short_description: A peaceful lifestyle companion for healthier meals, movement, sleep, and mindfulness habits.
brand.target_audience: People who want to improve health habits without shame and understand lifestyle patterns.
brand.brand_voice_notes: Calm, supportive, clean, peaceful, encouraging, non-judgmental, lightly playful.
brand.primary_cta: Try Washoku and log one real meal today.
brand.visual_style_notes: Soft natural colors, clean whitespace, simple food and habit visuals.

content_pillars: Cultural respect and global food balance

campaign.objective: Increase awareness and early trial signups

content_ideas: Why honest logging works better than perfection.
Meet Sprout, your gentle lifestyle companion.
A calm way to recover after an off-plan meal.
Walk after dinner: a tiny habit that helps rhythm.
Your Balance Garden grows through small choices.
Why Washoku is not a diet app.
